violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cloth left on prep table between uses.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Portable hand sink is out of water. *Employee washed hands at Deli Hand sink.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. -HAACP logs were last filled out 12/09/2025. *Staff stated required activities are still done daily but not documented. Observed PH test of today's rice at 4.0. *Staff stated the regional manager will be training them to use online documentation ASAP-company is going away from paper logs.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
